sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39778" key="e)pi/klwsma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπί-κλωσμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n39778.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spun yarn</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diogenian.</author> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epicur.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.53</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
